title: Wrokcanvas Search Text Missing
excerpt: Hey monday Team, at the moment there isn’t an ability to search for text on a workcanvas. Would be great to have this as they can get quite large with workflow maps.

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey monday Team, at the moment there isn’t an ability to search for text on a workcanvas. Would be great to have this as they can get quite large with workflow maps.
